note: M10 R0-gate integration (H6). Full E1M1 table set assembled into ONE flat .fjm via src/doomfj/build.py:build_doom. Assets from committed tests/fixtures/freedoom_e1m1.wad (Freedoom 0.13.0, BSD). 2x D5 downscale (owner R0 decision; shared bit-exact lever in texturecompiler.downscale_canvas, imported by the oracle - R6/D12).
verdict: R-3 GREEN: one flat .fjm, span 5.54M words = 0.66x the 2^23 limit, 1.51x headroom. Texture-span risk (OQ8) resolved by the 2x downscale. BSP-as-code deferred to M12 (balanced E1M1 node builder); M10 uses conservative geometry streams.
